title: One-Way (Unilateral) Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A protective one-way confidentiality agreement when only one party is sharing confidential secrets or business ideas with another party.
whatsCovered: Protection of sensitive business plans, financials, and source code
Restricted use of information to the designated evaluation purpose
Reasonable exceptions to confidentiality (public records, subpoenas)
Confidentiality term length and return of materials
Injunction remedies for breach of secrecy
whenToUse: Use this unilateral NDA when you are disclosing proprietary secrets or product concepts to a vendor, contractor, or investor, and they are not sharing secrets with you.

fields.label: Purpose of Evaluation
fields.placeholder: e.g. assessing a prospective manufacturing partnership

clauses.heading: ONE-WAY NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This Unilateral Non-Disclosure Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {disclosing_party}, located at {disclosing_address} ("Discloser"), and {receiving_party}, located at {receiving_address} ("Recipient").

clauses.heading: 1. Confidential Information
clauses.body: "Confidential Information" refers to any proprietary information, business files, trade secrets, software code, customer data, and designs disclosed by Discloser to Recipient during the discussions, whether marked as confidential or not.

clauses.heading: 2. Secrecy Obligations
clauses.body: Recipient agrees to hold Discloser's Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose it to any third party. Recipient shall use the Confidential Information solely for the following purpose: {evaluation_purpose}.

clauses.heading: 3. Term of Protection
clauses.body: The confidentiality obligations under this Agreement shall survive for a period of {term_years} years from the Effective Date, after which the Recipient's obligations shall expire.

clauses.heading: 4. Non-Solicitation of Clients
clauses.body: Recipient agrees that during the term of discussions and for 12 months thereafter, Recipient shall not solicit, contract, or do business with any client or customer of Discloser introduced during the evaluation.

clauses.heading: 5. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: What is the difference between a mutual and a one-way NDA?
faq.answer: A mutual NDA protects secrets shared by both parties. A one-way (unilateral) NDA only protects secrets shared by one party (the discloser) with a receiving party.

faq.question: Are verbal disclosures protected under this NDA?
faq.answer: It is always best practice to put disclosures in writing. However, this contract covers any disclosures made during discussions, regardless of medium.
